goals: Check what memories are currently stored about the user
Search for specific preferences or context related to communication style
Add a new explicit preference for how the assistant should respond
Verify the new preference was stored correctly by searching for it

memories.text: User prefers direct answers without fluff

user_agent_config.personality: Casually curious but somewhat disengaged. Tends to test systems with minimal effort and prefers direct, no-nonsense interactions. Skeptical of unnecessary complexity.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic conversational AI but does not know internal tool names, APIs, or how memory systems work under the hood. Treats the assistant as a generic chatbot.

end_condition: The user has added a new preference to the memory system and verified it was stored successfully.
